title: session.opened
description: Reply to a successful session.open. `last_seq` is the highest seq produced so far. `native_session_id` is the agent's own ACP sessionId, present only when it differs from `session_id` and the session is drivable (omitted for view-only sessions, #23/#24).

view_only.description: True when the session was resumed against an agent that couldn't reload it: readable but not drivable (#23).
